message:
test(e2e): Improve Playwright test suite stability and coverage

Comprehensive improvements to E2E test infrastructure addressing flaky tests
and improving test reliability. Enhances test utilities with better wait
strategies, adds robust clipboard testing, and improves accessibility testing
for keyboard navigation.

- Refactor global-setup.ts with improved server readiness detection (+131 LOC)
- Expand test-utils.ts with helper functions for common assertions (+182 LOC)
- Fix flaky encryption/password-flow tests with proper async handling
- Stabilize collapsible, copy-clipboard, and theme-toggle interaction tests
- Improve keyboard navigation accessibility tests
- Update CDN fallback and print preview tests for reliability
- Add setup metadata for test fixtures
- Configure Playwright for better parallel execution

Co-Authored-By: Claude <noreply@anthropic.com>
